title: După cine curăță Bolojan? Hai să vă zic care e faza cu USR şi Predoiu
summary: USR politician Cristian Ghinea details the institutional abuses committed by PNL during the PSD-PNL coalition years (2020-2024), including judicial harassment of USR mayors, weaponization of state institutions (DNA, ANAF, AEP) against the opposition, and the role of Justice Minister Cătălin Predoiu in the degradation of Romania's justice system. The article argues that PNL enabled a hybrid regime under Iohannis and Ciolacu, and criticizes Predoiu's audacity in confronting USR critics while seeking to lead the SRI intelligence service.
talking_points: PSD-PNL coalition systematically harassed USR mayors through judicial and institutional pressure, using DNA investigations as leverage to force party defections to PNL
The coalition drove Romania's budget deficit to unsustainable levels while USR warned publicly about fiscal irresponsibility, yet PNL now claims credit for fiscal repair under Bolojan
Justice Minister Predoiu bears direct responsibility for justice system degradation through his judicial reform laws, whose negative effects USR predicted at the time
State institutions including DNA, ANAF, and AEP were weaponized against opposition parties, constituting hybrid regime characteristics
Predoiu reportedly seeks to become head of SRI intelligence service, raising serious concerns about civilian control over intelligence services
related_concepts: rule of law in EU member states
author: Cristian Ghinea
